# size

**Instance Property**

Size in bytes of the sample.

## Declaration

```swift
var size: Int?
```

## Discussion

The size of the sample is only applicable for buffers carrying data blocks. For pixel buffers and tagged buffers, the size should be set to `nil`.
title: size
